page.title: Skills
page.description: Reusable procedures this agent can run.

addDialog.title: Add skills
addDialog.description: Install reusable procedures for your agent.

repo.inputHint: Enter a public GitHub repo in owner/repo format

scratch.titleHint: Use the phrase you'd say in chat. Houston turns it into a slug.
scratch.descriptionPlaceholder: Drafts a starter contract you can review and sign.
scratch.descriptionHint: Shown on the skill card. Say what the user gets, not how it works.
scratch.bodyPlaceholder:
## Procedure

1. Ask the user what kind of contract.
2. Pull the latest version from Drive.
3. Fill it in and share for review.
scratch.bodyHint: Markdown. The agent reads this when the skill runs.
scratch.errorDescriptionRequired: A description is required. Add one line saying what this skill does.
scratch.errorBodyRequired: Add at least one instruction step.
scratch.errorSlugTaken: A skill with this name already exists.

store.heading: Discover skills
store.subheading: Add ready-made skills from the community
store.browseUnavailable: Couldn't load skills. Check your internet and try again.
store.searchRateLimited: Skills.sh is busy right now. Wait a moment and try again.
store.searchOffline: Couldn't reach Skills.sh. Check your internet and try again.
store.searchGeneric: Skill search hit a snag. Wait a moment and try again.
store.minQuery: Type at least 2 characters to search
store.installFailedMalformed: This skill's file is broken. Try a different one.
store.installFailedRateLimited: Skills.sh is busy. Wait a moment and click again.
store.installFailedOffline: Couldn't connect. Check your internet and try again.
store.installFailedGeneric: Couldn't install that skill. Wait a moment and try again.

preview.loadFailed: Couldn't load the full description. You can still install.

unavailableToast.title: Skill unavailable
unavailableToast.description: This skill is no longer available. It may have been renamed or removed.

detail.deleteDescription: This removes the skill from your agent. You can reinstall it later.

tabs.customEmptyDescription: Create your own skill from scratch or import one from GitHub.
